thesis: Royal Gold is a Denver-based precious-metals royalty and streaming company that earns high-margin cash from production on mines operated by third parties. **[Fact]** FY2025 revenue was **$1,030 million**, operating income **$638 million**, and operating cash flow **$704.8 million** per `RGLD/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260219_rpt20251231_acc0000085535_26_000008.htm`. **[Fact]** The 2025 Sandstorm Gold combination roughly doubled scale; Q1 FY2026 revenue was **$469 million** with net income **$281.1 million** (diluted EPS **$3.30**) per `10-Q_20260507_rpt20260331_acc0000085535_26_000028.htm`. **[Fact]** Q1 FY2026 long-term debt was **$596 million** after **$300 million** of repayments versus **$895 million** at year-end 2025.
why_market_wrong: The stock may trade as levered gold beta at a full multiple after the Sandstorm combination, while the underlying model is a high-margin toll on ounces with limited sustaining capital spending. **[Inference]** FY2025 earnings power benefited from both metal prices and enlarged attributable production; the market can treat peak-year cash flow as permanent. **[Inference]** Proof-first component math at base case sums to about **$152** per share of economic value versus a price near **$217**, suggesting the market embeds development optionality and mid-cycle gold assumptions not yet reproduced in filing-locked owner-cash paths.

key_assumptions.source: Stooq RGLD.US close 2026-06-03 (refresh updates live price)

key_assumptions.input: Starting free cash flow per share
key_assumptions.source: FY2025 operating cash flow $704.8M on normalized ~78.3M diluted share base (10-K_20260219)
Combined portfolio growth near inflation plus modest development ramp [Assumption]

open_questions: Confirm live price and Q2 FY2026 operating cash flow after next 10-Q.
